pr.title: Bring CObjGetUpVector closer to a match
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Small decomp-matching cleanup in sysdolphin baselib camera object code: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector replaced an inline/generated-looking up-vector computation block with a call to HSD_CObjGetUpVector(cobj, &up). The bot report recorded HSD_CObjGetLeftVector improving from 33.92% to 98.65%, with +412 bytes, but no human review comments or PR body rationale were present.

key_files.role: Only changed file; HSD_CObjGetLeftVector now delegates up-vector acquisition to HSD_CObjGetUpVector instead of open-coding flag/roll/default-up fallback logic.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c added 1 deleted 16 hunks 1
raw_diff: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector hunk replacing inline up-vector block with res = HSD_CObjGetUpVector(cobj, &up)

what_changed.text: Removed a 16-line conditional block in HSD_CObjGetLeftVector that checked cobj flags, copied cobj->u.up, called roll2upvec, and fell back to default up vector {0.0f, 1.0f, 0.0f}.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted cobj flags/roll2upvec/set_up block

what_changed.text: Added a single call, res = HSD_CObjGetUpVector(cobj, &up), before the existing PSVECCrossProduct and vec_normalize_check logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_CObjGetUpVector(cobj, &up)

what_changed.text: Automated report recorded one improvement for main/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj, item HSD_CObjGetLeftVector, from 33.92% to 98.65%, bytes +412.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot] 2026-06-08T17:40:50Z

smart_moves.text: Reused an existing helper for up-vector recovery rather than duplicating its internals inside HSD_CObjGetLeftVector.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline logic replaced by HSD_CObjGetUpVector call

smart_moves.text: Kept the surrounding vector math structure intact after the helper call: cross product of up and eye followed by normalization check.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unchanged PSVECCrossProduct and vec_normalize_check following new call

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function contains a generated-looking duplicate of another recovered helper's logic, try delegating to the helper before preserving the expanded branch/goto form.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector replaced expanded up-vector logic with HSD_CObjGetUpVector
text_corpus bot report: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector improved to 98.65%

naming_conventions.text: Existing local names cobj, eye, up, left, res, HSD_CObjGetUpVector, HSD_CObjGetEyeVector, PSVECCrossProduct, and vec_normalize_check were preserved; no new naming convention was introduced.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: hunk context and added helper call

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Collapse duplicated conditional helper logic into the canonical helper call to influence code shape and matching score.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted conditional up-vector calculation and added HSD_CObjGetUpVector call
text_corpus bot report: 33.92% to 98.65% for HSD_CObjGetLeftVector
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR evidence supports a score improvement but does not include objdiff details, compiler output, or author explanation.

evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot] 2026-06-08T17:40:50Z

notes: Diff evidence is strong for the exact source change.
Automated report supports a matching-score improvement for HSD_CObjGetLeftVector.
No PR body, human review comments, objdiff details, or author rationale were available, so intent beyond helper reuse and score improvement is not inferred.
The PR title mentions CObjGetUpVector, while the changed hunk and bot report identify the improved item as HSD_CObjGetLeftVector using HSD_CObjGetUpVector.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try canonical helper calls before preserving duplicated generated-looking helper bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2635 shows HSD_CObjGetLeftVector improving after replacing an expanded up-vector calculation block with HSD_CObjGetUpVector(cobj, &up). This is a local example of helper reuse improving a decomp match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector hunk
text_corpus bot report: HSD_CObjGetLeftVector 33.92% to 98.65%

rejection_notes: Do not promote a global rule that helper calls always improve matches; this PR provides only one local CObj case.
Do not claim HSD_CObjGetLeftVector matched fully; the bot report shows 98.65%, not 100%, and no objdiff details are included.
Do not infer human reviewer intent or acceptance rationale; no review comments or reviews are present.
